title: Add V-AI-Powered YouTube Shorts Automation Platform to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Shorts on autopilot
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped that turns news URLs into fully automated YouTube Shorts. Perfect for when you want to run a media empire but only have time to paste a link.
gist.summary: Added the V-AI-Powered YouTube Shorts Automation Platform to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover a new community tool that automatically generates and publishes YouTube Shorts from news URLs.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot in a cozy video editing studio. The robot displays a vertical video (representing YouTube Shorts) while Polly holds a tiny director's clapperboard, symbolizing the automation of news into video.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny movie clapperboard next to a chunky monitor robot, whose screen shows a vertical video playing. They are in a cozy lo-fi video editing studio with lime green (#ecf874) and soft peach gradient lighting. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, wholesome vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
